content.en:
Ye Tian was in an area not too far from the entrance of the Heavenly Abyss, and began to copy his own cave light copy body.

Soon, a replica body was successfully replicated.

Then, one of the copy bodies hid and gathered their breath, and the other copy body began to go deep into the Dao Heavenly Abyss.

Ye Tian was very careful, the strength of his duplicate body was not very strong, and there were many Supreme Dao Blood Beasts here who could easily kill him.

After all, many of the Dual Dao Realm powerhouses have fallen here, and his strength has not yet reached the Dual Dao Realm!

......

"Supreme Dao Blood Beast!"

Ye Tian looked at the Supreme Dao Blood Beast in front of him, the other party's body exuded a powerful aura of rules, and his strength was definitely comparable to that of a top Supreme Dao Realm powerhouse, his duplicate body should not be an opponent.

"Run!"

Ye Tian used the Dao Flow Body Technique and prepared to escape.

But this Supreme Dao Blood Beast was a little faster.

Soon.

Ye Tian was caught up by this supreme blood beast, and the two sides had a big battle.

Thundered!!!

The rules of the Dao kept colliding, and the two sides fought extremely fiercely.

But in the end, Ye Tian was still defeated, and paid the price of his life, only to severely damage this supreme blood beast.

"The Dao Heavenly Abyss is really too dangerous, and those who are in the Dao Realm don't dare to come in at all. "

Ye Tian now finally knew the helplessness of Elder Taijiu in True River Valley, although he could collect materials to use the Great Array of Guiding Dao, but Elder Taijiu's strength was not good, and he would definitely not survive if he entered the Supreme Dao Heavenly Abyss to collect Imperial Dao Blood Gold.

And the Dao Blood Gold is one of those materials that is relatively easy to collect!

The ones who can really easily collect enough supreme Dao blood gold are those who are at the top of the Dual Dao Realm or the Dual Dao Realm are almost invincible, they are slightly united, plus some life-saving things, as long as they don't go deep into the deepest part of the Dao Heavenly Abyss, they will almost go sideways, enough to collect a lot of Supreme Dao Blood Gold.

A Heavy Dao Realm like Ye Tian is too weak, and he is almost certain to die.

If he hadn't been able to replicate a replica body, and he didn't care about the death of the replica body, he wouldn't have dared to come in.

"If my true body copy body breaks through to the First Dao Realm, then I can really sweep to the Dao Heavenly Abyss!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

But now, he hasn't obtained a lot of resources, and he doesn't dare to rashly copy his true body in the Infinite Domain, so let's wait until a long time later, and then try to copy his real body.

In the following days, Ye Tian tried to find the Supreme Dao Blood Gold again and again, but he often encountered the Supreme Dao Blood Beasts, and there were too many powerful Supreme Dao Blood Beasts, and even many of them had reached the Double Dao Realm.

If he encounters a blood beast of the double Dao realm, his duplicate body will almost be killed in a few moves.

this day.

Ye Tian finally found a piece of Supreme Dao Blood Gold.

This piece of Supreme Dao Blood Gold is very deeply hidden, if it weren't for him fighting with a Supreme Dao Blood Beast and letting this piece of Supreme Dao Blood Gold be revealed, otherwise it would not be easy to find.

Subsequently, he used other replica bodies to lead the way, sacrificing a replica body, and only then did he safely send back the Supreme Dao Blood Gold.

In the years that followed, Ye Tian slowly searched for the Supreme Dao Blood Gold, even if it took a long time to find a piece of the Supreme Dao Blood Gold, but after a long time, he had more Supreme Dao Blood Gold in his hand.

And.

He often came out of the Supreme Dao Heavenly Abyss, just to bring the Supreme Dao Blood Gold out safely, otherwise even if he stayed at the entrance of the Supreme Dao Heavenly Abyss, he would be at risk of falling.

Before I knew it, more than 30 years had passed.

After such a long time, Ye Tian finally gathered a hundred pieces of Supreme Dao Blood Gold.

In addition to the Supreme Dao Blood Gold, he also obtained a lot of resources, which were very helpful to him.

Since there was still a long time before the next opening of the Supreme Dao Blood Gold, he continued to collect various resources and Supreme Dao Blood Gold in the Supreme Dao Heavenly Abyss.

Gradually, he gained more and more.

Before I knew it, more than a thousand years had passed.

......

The land of eternity.

Ye Tian's true body copy body is still the eighth balance realm, due to the fact that the entire Eternal Land and the origin of the reincarnation domain have been greatly reduced, although it is now stable, and there is no Wuji Dao Tree to draw the origin, but the origin cannot be recovered for a long time, and the resources are scarce.

In addition, he is in the eighth balance realm, and he needs more advanced resources, and the reincarnation domain does not have such resources.

Therefore, it is difficult for his cultivation to improve, and he is currently far from the eighth balance limit.

"The Cave Light Replicating Body has collected enough resources, and if it is used in the hands of the True Body Replicating Body, it can definitely greatly improve the cultivation, and it is absolutely no problem to reach the Eighth Balance Realm. Ye Tian thought to himself.

But after all this time, is the Wuji Heavenly Palace still searching for his traces?

"Why don't you test it?"

Ye Tian muttered.

If the Wuji Heavenly Palace didn't continue to search for his traces, he would be able to hide somewhere in the Wuji Domain to cultivate.

When the time comes, if you cultivate your true body to the Supreme Dao Realm, your strength will become extremely terrifying.

......

Infinite Domain.

Ruin Collar.

This is a place with relatively poor resources, and there are no powerful forces, Ye Tian came here, ready to copy his true body here, and then give some of the resources to the real body to copy the body, so that the real body can copy the body and cultivate honestly here.

Even if someone finds out, nothing happens.

There are still a few Origin Realms in the Infinite Domain, and some Supreme Dao Realms have also come out of the Origin Realm.

It is still relatively rare for an Origin Realm like the Reincarnation Domain to be used by the Infinite Heavenly Palace to cultivate the Infinite Dao Tree.

Mainly, some Origin Realms are in the hands of other forces, and Wuji Heavenly Palace is embarrassed to snatch them directly.

Therefore, it was not a strange thing that some Origin Upper Realm Overlords from the Origin Realm appeared in the Infinite Domain.

Moreover, when he cultivated in the Infinite Domain and broke through to the Supreme Dao Realm, his body was contaminated with the origin of the Infinite Domain, and the aura that belonged to the Origin Realm would be much lighter, and then he would use secret techniques to cover his breath, and it would definitely not be easy to find out his identity.

Airplanes!

The real body is copied, and the body is copied.

Ye Tian transferred some of the resources to the real body copy body, and then the cave light copy body directly chose to leave.

In the following days, Ye Tian practiced here to improve his cultivation.

Many of the resources he had found from the Supreme Dao Heavenly Abyss were very suitable for the True Body Replicating Body, which could greatly improve the cultivation of the True Body Replicating Body.

Before you know it, some more years have passed.

this day.

The Great Array of the Approach of Taisu Palace is about to be opened, and a person who meets the requirements of the Dao Realm applies to enter the Approach Array.
